{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Watch-leader Fitch
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Watch-leader Fitch]] has gills on the sides of his neck.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Fitch is a Watch-leader.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
